closureCriteria.criterion: truth model is implemented with ledgers as source of truth for cryptographic finality
evidence: packages/btd/src/reconciliation.ts compares LedgerObservedFact rows with DatabaseProjectedFact rows
confirmed, reorged, and failed ledger finality mismatches are blocking repairs
packages/btd/__tests__/v27-crypto-primitives.test.ts proves confirmed ledger facts cannot be downgraded by database projection

closureCriteria.criterion: database projections cannot override confirmed ledger facts
evidence: reconcileLedgerDatabaseProjection emits deterministic ledger_finality_state repairs when projected finality differs from observed ledger finality
package/API tests prove a database broadcast projection against a confirmed ledger fact produces a blocking repair
/api/btd/ledger-database-reconciliation returns the blocking report through the commercial route boundary

closureCriteria.criterion: non-ledgerized private/metaphysical facts are canonical in database and bound by hashes or receipts
evidence: MetaphysicalCanonicalFact requires fact id, fact kind, canonical root, optional receipt root, and private=true
package and demonstration tests reject unmarked or unbound metaphysical facts
reconciliation Terminal journal entries include metaphysical canonical roots or receipt roots in receiptRoots

closureCriteria.criterion: reconciliation is idempotent and produces repair/alert receipts
evidence: repair ids are deterministic from reconciliation id, fact id, and repair kind
package tests replay the same confirmed-ledger mismatch and receive identical repair receipts
btd_ledger_database_reconciliation_repairs persists repair id, reconciliation id, fact id, repair kind, before/after values, blocking flag, and issued_at

closureCriteria.criterion: commercial route is unversioned and commit-gated
evidence: uapi/app/api/btd/ledger-database-reconciliation/route.ts binds the Next.js App Router endpoint without a versioned route prefix
registry writes occur only when commitToRegistry is explicitly true

validatedCommands.notes: Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 package/API slice.
Jest reports pre-existing duplicate manual mock warnings outside the V27 ORM slice.

nonPromotionAssertions: BITCODE_SPEC.txt remained V26 until Gate 16 promotion
BITCODE_SPEC_V27_PROVEN.md did not exist until Gate 16 promotion
Gate 14 closure does not claim production ledger observer rollout, generated V27 proof-family closure, or V27 promotion
All BTD API route paths remain unversioned
